emails.body:
Team,

The FY27 rotation slate has been finalized. Stix, you’re slated for the Pacific Fleet staff billet; James, you’re on the JIATF‑South watch. Please review the assignments and let me know of any conflicts by COB tomorrow.

Thanks,
Laura

Thanks, Captain. The Pacific Fleet assignment works for me. I’ll coordinate with the detailer on dates.

— Stix

Captain,

I noticed the San Diego billets on the slate. Could you confirm if the JIATF‑South liaison slot is still open? I’d like to express interest if it aligns with the timeline.

Thanks,
James

Stix, James —

Orders are expected to cut by 15 Oct. Stix, your report date is 1 Nov; James, the San Diego liaison is filled, but I can keep you on the alternate list. Let me know if you need any adjustments.

— Laura

Captain,

Appreciate the clarity. I’ll finalize my turnover plan and have the package to you by COB Friday. If there’s any change to the report date, please advise.

— Stix
